svg.text: RADIO: "30 METERS — DOWN AT 2½ — DUST VISIBLE — TRUST THE TAPE."

svg.text: MOCKUP 03 · FINAL APPROACH · 31 m AGL, camera pitched ~18° below horizon · V-SPD in green band, hazard tint + redesignation, ballistic dust (no billowing — vacuum)
